title: rubus ardens
intro: Rubus ardens, also known as the burning briar or fiery raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. It has medicinal properties, primarily due to its high content of salicylic acid, which is similar to aspirin. The plant is known for its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and relieving pain, as well as its antiseptic and antiviral properties. Rubus ardens can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties and health benefits.
